content.en:
The secret technique that Ye Tian obtained this time was called the Secret of Swallowing, which allowed Ye Tian to devour the blood of the life of the powerful Boundary River, and strengthen his own bloodline and life level.

Although Ye Tian condensed the Supreme Legendary Body, placed in the Void Region, this is definitely an incomparably powerful physique, but when placed in the Boundary River, it is very ordinary.

In the Boundary River, many beings are born with supreme legendary bodies, their bodies are extremely strong, and their strength far exceeds that of their peers.

And Ye Tian is really inferior to some top Boundary River lifeforms in terms of physical strength, this is the gap in the essence of life.

It's like the descendants of some Eternal Masters, as soon as they are born, their life level and physique far surpass those of other cultivators.

Once Ye Tian cultivated the secret of swallowing, devoured the blood of many top realm river lifeforms, and transformed his own bloodline and life level, at that time, even if his cultivation did not improve, his combat effectiveness would definitely increase a lot.

It also helps to impact the Eternal Master.

If the Peak Legendary Realm Lord wants to become an Eternal Master, he does not need to go through the realm of a half-step Eternal Master, and he can directly impact it.

As long as the Peak Legendary Realm Lord can control the origin of time and space, and form the Long River of Time and the Kukai in his body, he can break through to the realm of the Eternal Master.

Essentially, the Eternal Masters are on the same level as the Eternal Realm, and because of this,19 the Eternal Masters are not bound by the Eternal Realm, and are free to walk through the timeline and across the past and future.

However, once the breakthrough fails, under the backlash of time and space, the body of the peak Legendary Realm Lord will not be able to bear it at all, and it will be directly shattered and turned into nothingness.

But once you break through and become an eternal master, not only will your will improve a lot, but the space-time control power in your body will also completely transform into a real control power, and your body will also become an eternal control body.

However, many Peak Legendary Realm Lords will not attack the Eternal Masters when they are at the fifth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and only some Peak Legendary Realm Lords who are stranded in the Eternal Realm and have not entered the Boundary River will rashly attack the Eternal Masters, and the result will be a fall.

Most cultivators will strive to cultivate the Supreme Legendary Body to the consummation realm, increase their will power to the middle of the eighth order, and control more than thirty percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, that is, after reaching the combat power of the half-step Eternal Master, they will attack the Eternal Master, so the probability is slightly higher.

If a person can control his Supreme Legendary Body 100%, then there is almost a 100% hope of impacting the Eternal Controller realm, because such a demon is 100% controllable of the Supreme Legendary Body, even if the breakthrough fails, he can control the power of the backlash in time, he will not fall, he can try again and again, and he will definitely be able to become the Eternal Master.

Unfortunately, it is even harder to have 100% control over your Supreme Legendary Body than it is to become the Eternal Master.

"The higher the level of life, the stronger the bloodline, the easier it is to cultivate the Supreme Legendary Body to the consummation realm, it is rumored that there are some special Realm River life, although it is only a half-step Eternal Master's combat power, the strength of the Determination Body is second only to the Eternal Master. If I had such a powerful body, I would not have fallen even if I had attacked the Eternal Master. If the Secret of Swallowing is really so strong, I don't need to worry about the risk of failure and fall!"

㓚㿀 Secret Road.

It is conceivable that if such a secret technique spreads, I am afraid that even the eternal controller will be crazy to snatch it!

At this time.

Outside the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, the information that Ye Tian had passed the ninth level was also displayed.

The ordinary peak Legendary Realm lord only felt that Ye Tian was awesome, but he couldn't realize what this meant.

And those Eternal Masters who knew the situation of the ninth level, as well as the very few half-step Eternal Controllers, were stunned.

"How is it possible, Ye Tian has actually passed the ninth level of the Half-tooth Ancient Pagoda!!!"

Takuyu's controller looked surprised and incredulous.

He knew very well what the ninth level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda was, and the half-tooth master would not know the secret techniques on it, so that someone could comprehend it.

Of course, these Eternal Masters don't have the opportunity to comprehend, because this secret art only allows the Peak Legendary Realm Lord to comprehend, and if the Eternal Masters go to comprehend, they will not be able to comprehend anything.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Tower obtained this secret technique when it was in the realm of the Eternal Controller of the Half-Step Eternal Master, but unfortunately it was unable to comprehend, and later became the Eternal Controller, so it was even more unable to comprehend.

So, after the half-tooth master built the half-tooth ancient tower, he put the secret art scroll map in the ninth level.

From the distant times to the present, there have been many people who have passed the eighth level of the Banya Ancient Tower, and they have all gone to the ninth level, but they have all failed.

But now, a peak Legendary Realm Lord like Ye Tian has actually passed the ninth level.

"I'm afraid I'm not qualified to accept a demon like Ye Tian as a disciple. "

"Yes, it is rumored that that secret art is related to an incomparably ancient eternal master, maybe it is the entrance test for such an ancient existence to select disciples, if it competes with such an eternal master, it is to find death!"

"Wait for Ye Tian to come out and see if he has the imprint aura of the ancient eternal master on his body. "

Soon.

Ye Tian walked out of the ninth level of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Tower has a total of nine levels, so he came out after clearing the level.

Unfortunately, there are no rewards after clearing the level.

However, after harvesting the Secret of Swallowing and the Token of the Half-Tooth Secret Domain, he was already very satisfied.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian walked out of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, and his eyes looked at him one after another.

And Ye Tian was surprised to find that there were more than a dozen gazes that were not simple, which brought him heavy pressure, although the other party's aura was only the peak of the fifth level Legendary Realm Lord, but the will coercion was extremely terrifying.

"The embodiment of the Eternal Master!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Although the 720 Eternal Masters do not have the ability of clones, they have hundreds of millions of incarnations, and each avatar has the combat power of the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, and there are also main battle avatars, which are comparable to the top half-step Eternal Masters combat power.

Obviously, these dozen or so are the Eternal Masters.

Tuoyu and the others spied on Ye Tian, and immediately sensed that Ye Tian had the imprint aura of other eternal controllers on his body, and the owner of the aura far surpassed him.

"Sure enough, Ye Tian has been taken by an incomparably ancient and powerful Eternal Master, even if he is not currently accepted as a disciple, he is also one of the preparatory disciples!"

Tuoyu and other eternal controllers secretly said.

"Ye Tian, you are very good, you have actually passed the ninth level of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower, if you have time, you can come to Tuoyu Giant City as a guest!" Tuoyu Controller smiled.

After greeting Ye Tian, the Eternal Masters left here, all of them giving up their plans to accept disciples.

And the Peak Legendary Realm Lord who didn't know why these Eternal Masters didn't accept Ye Tian as a disciple.

But soon, they had a guess, that is, Ye Tian had a master, and he was a disciple of a certain Eternal Controller, so they would not accept Ye Tian as a disciple.

At this time, many peak Legendary Realm lords wanted to befriend Ye Tian, but Ye Tian did not stay here.

He was not in a hurry to go to the Half-Tooth Secret Domain, he was going to learn more about the Half-Tooth Secret Domain before choosing to enter there.

So, Ye Tian soon returned to Qinglian Giant City. _
